metadata.description: High 5 Games Claude plugin marketplace — slot art generation, GDD tooling, and other game-production utilities.

plugins.name: skill-auditor
plugins.description: Audits a Claude skill against an 8-dimension quality rubric (frontmatter, description quality, instruction clarity, reference integrity, completeness, output spec, evals, security). Returns a READY / NEEDS WORK / DRAFT verdict with specific, actionable findings.

plugins.name: slot-art-creator-node
plugins.description: Generate, QA, and resize mobile slot machine art (symbols, UI, backgrounds, key art) with Nano Banana 2. 11 numbered slash commands, persistent project memory, dual-provider routing (Gemini + fal.ai).
